From "security" to "commodity"

June 2023:

> SEC labels SOL a security in Binance & Coinbase lawsuits
> Robinhood delists
> SOL drops ~30%
> Entire narrative flips overnight
> No court ruling

2024 - 2025:

> SEC quietly removes the claim
> Both cases dismissed
> No penalties. No verdict.

2026:

> SEC classifies SOL as a digital commodity alongside BTC & ETH
> ETFs bought $1B of SOL
> Solana is the only chain where you can trade Treasuries, ETFs, Stocks, Metals

Same asset
Different narrative

Clarity always wins

1. Transfer funds privately using @solflare

Their Privacy Aggregator Layer routes through @HoudiniSwap

Just switch from public to private before signing the transaction

2. Trade privately using @Titan_Exchange, powered by @vanishTrade

Once you've sent funds privately, connect to Titan, choose Private mode, deposit to your Vanish wallet and start swapping

You can stay private while using your favorite protocols
